chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1385 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5343/2025 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 23-09-2025 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for the Petitioner M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan and Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocates for Respondent No.6 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner by filing statement dated 23-09- 2025 submits Representation preferred by the Petitioner along with Courier receipt and submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the instant Constitutional Petition, if the directions are issued to the Respondents / SPSC to decide the Representation, filed by the Petitioner through Courier, pending before the Respondents / SPSC within a short span of time, which is not opposed by learned AAG as well as Counsel appearing for Respondent No.6. Under the circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to the Respondents / SPSC to decide the Representation of the Petitioner preferred under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023 within 15 (fifteen) days, if pending, after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
